revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:延暦寺, en:Enryaku-ji); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/93057298 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==延暦寺で山口組が歴代組長の法要== ニュースとしては気になっている話だったので、いつものクセでWikipediaを調べたのだが、まさか冒頭部にこの話が書かれているとは思わなかった。百科事典が現在進行形の話を、しかも現在の版では「（うわさ）」なとどいう書き込みまでされているのはいかがなものか。-- 218.217.238.186 2006年5月18日 (木) 13:40 (UTC) 同意します。ニュースになった事実なので、削除はなんですが。--[[利用者:Los688|Los688]] 2006年5月18日 (木) 13:46 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1305777205 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|religion=y}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }} ---- ==Project Assessment== Please expand. Enryaku-ji is a very major topic; I'm surprised there isn't more written here. Maybe I'll have to come back here... [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] 00:46, 28 November 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Enryaku-ji]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814760211|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120424230529/http://guildspot.org/rno/modules.php?name=News&file=article&sid=1541 to http://guildspot.org/rno/modules.php?name=News&file=article&sid=1541 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 19:42, 10 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/93057298 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==延暦寺で山口組が歴代組長の法要== ニュースとしては気になっている話だったので、いつものクセでWikipediaを調べたのだが、まさか冒頭部にこの話が書かれているとは思わなかった。百科事典が現在進行形の話を、しかも現在の版では「（うわさ）」なとどいう書き込みまでされているのはいかがなものか。-- 218.217.238.186 2006年5月18日 (木) 13:40 (UTC) 同意します。ニュースになった事実なので、削除はなんですが。--[[User:Los688|Los688]] 2006年5月18日 (木) 13:46 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1305777205 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|religion=y}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }} ---- ==Project Assessment== Please expand. Enryaku-ji is a very major topic; I'm surprised there isn't more written here. Maybe I'll have to come back here... [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] 00:46, 28 November 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Enryaku-ji]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814760211|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120424230529/http://guildspot.org/rno/modules.php?name=News&file=article&sid=1541 to http://guildspot.org/rno/modules.php?name=News&file=article&sid=1541 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 19:42, 10 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Gryffindor]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Enryaku-ji here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/93057298 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==延暦寺で山口組が歴代組長の法要== ニュースとしては気になっている話だったので、いつものクセでWikipediaを調べたのだが、まさか冒頭部にこの話が書かれているとは思わなかった。百科事典が現在進行形の話を、しかも現在の版では「（うわさ）」なとどいう書き込みまでされているのはいかがなものか。-- 218.217.238.186 2006年5月18日 (木) 13:40 (UTC) 同意します。ニュースになった事実なので、削除はなんですが。--[[User:Los688|Los688]] 2006年5月18日 (木) 13:46 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1305777205 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|religion=y}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }} ---- ==Project Assessment== Please expand. Enryaku-ji is a very major topic; I'm surprised there isn't more written here. Maybe I'll have to come back here...
